description: You use the elements in the replicator folder to replicate packages across IBM webMethods Integration Servers. This folder contains services that you can use to push packages from your IBM webMethods Integration Servers to a subscriber's server. It also contains services that you can use to pull packages from a publisher's server to your IBM webMethods Integration Server.

services.name: pub.replicator:addReleaseRegistryEntry
description: WmPublic. Adds an entry to the IBM webMethods Integration Server's Package Release Registry.

input_parameters.name: package
description: Name of the package. The service confirms that this package exists on the server before adding an entry to the Package Release Registry.

input_parameters.name: name
description: Name of the release. This name could be different from the name of the package.

input_parameters.name: version
description: Version number of the release, in the format #.# or #.#.# (for example, 1.2 or 1.2.1).

input_parameters.name: build
description: Build number of the release (for example, 12, 530).

input_parameters.name: patchNums
description: One or more comma-separated patch numbers included in this release.

input_parameters.name: JVMVersion
description: Minimum JVM version number that this release requires.

input_parameters.name: description
description: Brief description of this release. You may want to use this parameter to summarize the nature and purpose of the release.

output_parameters.name: packages
description: Entries in the server's Package Release Registry.

children.name: name
description: Name of the release.

children.name: version
description: Version number of the release, in the format #.# or #.#.# (for example, 1.2 or 1.2.1).

children.name: build
description: Conditional. Build number of the release (for example, 12, 530).

children.name: patch_nums
description: Conditional. Comma-separated list of patch numbers included in this release.

children.name: time
description: Time when the package was released.

children.name: jvm_version
description: Minimum JVM version number that the release requires.

children.name: description
description: Conditional. Brief description of this release.

children.name: source_server_version
description: Version number of Integration Server that released the package.

usage_notes: Before using this service, use pub.replicator:packageCreation to create a package zip file in the server's outbound directory. When you use addReleaseRegistryEntry to add an entry to the Package Release Registry, the package name you specify in package should match the package name you specified in pub.replicator:packageCreation.

services.name: pub.replicator:deleteReleaseRegistryEntry
description: WmPublic. Deletes an entry from the IBM webMethods Integration Server's Package Release Registry.

input_parameters.name: packageName
description: Name of the release that you want to delete.

output_parameters.name: packages
description: Entries that remain in the server's Package Release Registry.

children.name: name
description: Name of the release.

children.name: version
description: Version number of the release, in the format #.# or #.#.# (for example, 1.2 or 1.2.1).

children.name: build
description: Conditional. Build number of the release (for example, 12, 530).

children.name: patch_nums
description: Conditional. Comma-separated list of patch numbers included in this release.

children.name: time
description: Time when the package was released.

children.name: jvm_version
description: Minimum JVM version number that the release requires.

children.name: description
description: Conditional. Brief description of the release.

children.name: source_server_version
description: Version number of Integration Server that released the package.

services.name: pub.replicator:distributeViaFTP
description: WmPublic. Allows a publisher to send a package to a subscriber via FTP or allows a subscriber to retrieve a package from a publisher via FTP.

input_parameters.name: packageName
description: Name of the released package.

input_parameters.name: action
description: Set to:
- get to retrieve a package from the publisher's server. This is the default.
- put to send a package to a subscriber's server.

input_parameters.name: serverhost
description: Host name or IP address of the remote Integration Server.

input_parameters.name: serverport
description: Number of the FTP port on the remote Integration Server.

input_parameters.name: username
description: User name that your server will use to log on to the remote Integration Server.

input_parameters.name: password
description: Password that your server will use to log on to the remote Integration Server.

services.name: pub.replicator:distributeViaSvcPull
description: WmPublic. Pulls a specified package release from a publisher's server.

input_parameters.name: packageName
description: Name of the release.

input_parameters.name: publisher
description: Alias of the publisher's server.

services.name: pub.replicator:distributeViaSvcPush
description: WmPublic. Pushes a package from your server to a list of subscribers (other IBM webMethods Integration Servers).

input_parameters.name: packageName
description: The name of the release.

input_parameters.name: subscriber
description: List of the subscriber's host names or IP addresses.

services.name: pub.replicator:generateReplicationEvent
description: WmPublic. Generates a replication event.

You might invoke this service in conjunction with other services to make the package replication process generate an event. The replication event handler would listen for this event and perform some prescribed action that you have specified.

input_parameters.name: packageName
description: Name of the package.

input_parameters.name: action
description: User-defined string that describes the replication event, such as “pulled” or “pushed.”

services.name: pub.replicator:getLocalReleasedList
description: WmPublic. Returns all entries in your IBM webMethods Integration Server's Package Release Registry.

output_parameters.name: packages
description: Entries in the server's Package Release Registry.

children.name: name
description: Name of the release.

children.name: version
description: Version number of the release, in the format #.# or #.#.# (for example, 1.2 or 1.2.1).

children.name: build
description: Conditional. Build number of the release (for example, 12, 530).

children.name: patch_nums
description: Conditional. Comma-separated list of the patch numbers included in this release.

children.name: time
description: Time when the package was released.

children.name: jvm_version
description: Minimum JVM version number that the release requires.

children.name: description
description: Conditional. Brief description of the release.

children.name: source_server_version
description: Version number of IBM webMethods Integration Server that released the package.

services.name: pub.replicator:getRemoteReleasedList
description: WmPublic. Queries the publisher for released packages.
This service gets a list of released packages to which your server subscribes. You can use the list to find out if any new packages, or newer versions of existing packages, have been released.

input_parameters.name: publisher
description: Alias of the publishing server.

output_parameters.name: packages
description: List of released packages on the publishing server to which you subscribe.

children.name: name
description: Name of the release.

children.name: version
description: Version number of the release, in the format #.# or #.#.# (for example, 1.2 or 1.2.1).

children.name: build
description: Conditional. Build number of the release (for example, 12, 530).

children.name: patch_nums
description: Conditional. Comma-separated list of the patch numbers included in this release.

children.name: time
description: Time when the package was released.

children.name: jvm_version
description: Minimum JVM version number that the release requires.

children.name: description
description: Conditional. Brief description of the release.

children.name: source_server_version
description: Version number of IBM webMethods Integration Server that released the package.

services.name: pub.replicator:notifyPackageRelease
description: WmPublic. Sends an e-mail message to subscribers who have said that they want to be notified when a new release becomes available.

input_parameters.name: packageName
description: Name of the release.

services.name: pub.replicator:packageCreation
description: WmPublic. Creates a distribution file (a zip file) for the package.

input_parameters.name: package
description: Name of the package.

input_parameters.name: name
description: Name of the release.

input_parameters.name: version
description: Version number of the release, in the format #.# or #.#.# (for example, 1.2 or 1.2.1).

input_parameters.name: build
description: Build number of the release (for example, 12, 530).

input_parameters.name: patchNums
description: Comma-separated list of patch numbers included in the release.

input_parameters.name: targetPkgVersion
description: Version number of the target package. To prevent the installation program from overwriting an existing (higher) version of the package, this field is checked when the subscriber installs this package over an existing package.

input_parameters.name: targetServerVersion
description: Version number of the IBM webMethods Integration Server that this release requires.

input_parameters.name: JVMVersion
description: Minimum JVM version number that this release requires.

input_parameters.name: description
description: Brief description of this release. You might use this parameter to summarize the nature and purpose of the release.

input_parameters.name: type
description: - full to indicate a full package. This is the default.
- partial to indicate a patch or an update for the package.

input_parameters.name: filter
description: If only selected files are to be included, use this parameter in conjunction with fileList to specify which files to include.
Set to:
- includeall to include all the files in the distribution file. This is the default.
- include to include selected files in the distribution file.
- exclude to include all except selected files in the distribution file.

input_parameters.name: fileList
description: Names of files to include or exclude from the distribution file, depending on the value of filter.

input_parameters.name: fileNamePattern
description: Pattern string that specifies the names of files to be included in the distribution file. The asterisk (*) is the only wildcard character allowed in a pattern string. All other characters are treated literally (for example, *.java, *.dsp).

input_parameters.name: filesToDeleteList
description: Optional. The names of files that will be deleted from the target package when the subscribing server installs the package created by this service.

output_parameters.name: $result
description: Conditional. If the distribution file is created successfully, this parameter contains the value OK. If the distribution file was not created successfully, this parameter is not present in the output signature and the service throws an exception.

usage_notes: After you use packageCreation to create the package, use pub.replicator:addReleaseRegistryEntry to add an entry to the Package Release Registry. The package name you specify in packageCreation should match the package name you specify in pub.replicator:addReleaseRegistryEntry.
